parameters: Here is your free starting kit, just
like it was promised in the promo pamphlet!
You’ll find weapons, clothes, trinkets and
thamaturgical stuff we’ve put together for new recruits.
And yes, it even includes a gun!
Make sure to visit our \C[1]Training center\C[0],
just take the the stairs below
You found a set of basic items!
The \C[1]Hypernet Point\C[0] is a meeting place for
all the explorers of the Omega Tower, is also
the starting point for the climb.
Go upstairs to start your climb of the Omega Tower,
Use the elevator to reach any explored floor
Use the elevator to reach any explored floor
